title: Causodes's Ship Combat (Core)
description: System-agnostic ship combat engine for Foundry VTT. Provides the bridge-crew framework, socket protocol, canvas overlays, and template infrastructure. Requires a system-specific companion module (e.g. Causodes's Ship Combat (Imperium Maledictum)) to activate.

optional.reason: Enables animated weapon effects on the canvas.
Provides the JB2A asset library used by the optional animations.
